name: lore-hound
description: Source-hunting research harness: fan-out web search → fetch+summarize → adversarial verification → cited synthesis. Zero parametric knowledge — answers only from verified sources.

interface.shortDescription: Deep web research, grounded only in verified sources
interface.longDescription: Lore Hound is a source-first research harness: it fans out web searches, fetches and cites sources, adversarially verifies each claim against recent reliable sources, and synthesizes a cited report. Zero parametric knowledge — it answers only from fetched and verified sources, marking gaps as [NEEDS SOURCE] instead of inventing.
defaultPrompt: Use Lore Hound to research this question with cited, verified web sources.
Use Lore Hound to fact-check this claim against recent reliable sources.
